Why Exhibit

Your Gateway to Bangladesh's Booming Elevator Market

Bangladesh is among South Asia's fastest-growing construction markets. With 170+ million people, rapid urbanization, and thousands of high-rise buildings under development, the demand for elevator and smart building technologies has never been greater.

  • Direct access to 10,000+ industry professionals
  • Real estate developers & architects
  • Government procurement officials
  • Licensed contractors & engineers
  • International B2B matchmaking sessions
  • Live product launch opportunities
  • Media coverage & brand visibility
  • BEELIA certified network access
SECURE YOUR STALL →
Expo Highlights

What Awaits at BEELIA Expo 2026

🌍
International Participation

Brands from China, Japan, South Korea, Germany, Turkey, USA, and across South Asia convene in Dhaka for three days of industry exchange.

🤝
B2B Matchmaking

Structured one-on-one business meetings connect exhibitors with qualified buyers, developers, importers, and government stakeholders.

🚀
Product Launches

Launch your latest elevator systems, IoT controllers, safety solutions, and smart building integrations to Bangladesh's most influential audience.

🏆
Industry Leaders

Hear from global CEOs, BGMEA architects, RAJUK officials, and smart city planners shaping vertical mobility's future in Bangladesh.

📡
Technology Showcase

AI-powered elevators, energy-efficient drives, IoT monitoring, smart cabin systems, and next-gen safety technologies on live display.

🔗
Networking Events

Evening networking dinners, VIP receptions, and cocktail sessions with Bangladesh's top real estate and construction decision-makers.

The Venue

International Convention City Bashundhara

Bangladesh's premier international exhibition and convention facility — the region's most prestigious address for global industry events.

🏛️
Halls 1, 2, 3 & 4

Four dedicated exhibition halls offering expansive, world-class space for 100+ exhibitors simultaneously.

✈️
Airport Proximity

20 minutes from Hazrat Shahjalal International Airport. Convenient access for international delegates and exhibitors.

🅿️
Ample Parking

Dedicated multi-level parking facilities for thousands of visitors, exhibitors, and delegate vehicles.

🏨
5-Star Hotels Nearby

Multiple international hotels within the Bashundhara area and Dhaka's prime hospitality district.

Industry Coverage

Sectors Represented

🛗
Elevators

Passenger, freight, panoramic, and hydraulic elevator systems from global manufacturers.

⚙️
Escalators

Commercial and public-use escalator systems, heavy-duty and energy-efficient models.

🔄
Moving Walkways

Travelator and moving walkway solutions for airports, malls, and transit hubs.

🤖
Smart Lift Systems

AI-powered, IoT-connected, and destination-dispatch intelligent elevator systems.

🛡️
Safety Technologies

EN 81 compliant safety devices, governors, buffers, landing doors, and monitoring systems.

🏢
Building Automation

BMS integration, smart access control, energy management and vertical transport coordination.

🔩
Components & Parts

Traction machines, controllers, drives, ropes, guide rails, buttons, and cabin finishes.

🔧
Maintenance Solutions

Preventive maintenance tools, remote diagnostics, AMC services, and retrofit solutions.

Floor Plan

Exhibition Hall Layout

ICCB Halls 1–4 · Online interactive booking coming soon

H1
Hall 1 — International Brands

Premium pavilions and flagship booths from global elevator manufacturers including KONE, OTIS, and international partners.

H2
Hall 2 — Components & Technology

Elevator components, controllers, drives, safety systems, and smart technology showcases from Chinese, Korean, and European suppliers.

H3
Hall 3 — Local & Regional Exhibitors

Bangladesh's leading elevator importers, distributors, installers, and AMC service providers presenting their full product ranges.

H4
Hall 4 — Innovation & Seminars

Smart building tech, future of mobility showcases, conference stage, B2B meeting zone, and VIP networking lounge.

What Exhibitors Say

Success Stories
